heroSubtitle: Connecting Indonesia's finest products to global markets with quality assurance and reliable service
certifiedDesc: REWAKO certified by Bank Indonesia and ITPC supported
qualityDesc: Strict quality control and international standards
logisticsDesc: On-time delivery with full documentation support
productsDesc: Discover our curated selection of Indonesia's finest export commodities
downloadCatalogDesc: Get our complete catalog with detailed specifications
footerAbout: PT Nusantara Global Export is a leading Indonesian exporter committed to delivering premium quality commodities to international markets.
quoteModalDesc: Fill in your details and we'll get back to you within 24 hours
aboutP1: PT Nusantara Global Export is a proud member of REWAKO Ekspor Sulawesi Selatan (Bank Indonesia Export Community for South Sulawesi). We are committed to promoting Indonesian commodities to international markets with the highest quality standards.
aboutP2: As a REWAKO-certified exporter, we adhere to strict quality control, documentation standards, and international trade compliance. Our membership ensures credibility and trustworthiness in every transaction, backed by Bank Indonesia's rigorous certification process.
needCustomDesc: We offer customized packaging and delivery terms to meet your specific requirements.
aboutHeroTitle: Exporting the Best of Indonesia to the World
aboutHeroSubtitle: Learn about our journey, our commitment to quality, and our vision to empower local producers.
visionDesc: To be the leading and most trusted global gateway for Indonesian premium commodities, empowering local communities.
missionDesc1: Consistently delivering superior quality commodities that meet global market standards.
missionDesc2: Building sustainable partnerships with local farmers and international buyers based on trust and integrity.
missionDesc3: Ensuring seamless, safe, and timely logistical experiences for all clients.
contactHeroSubtitle: Have inquiries or want to discuss business opportunities? We are here to assist you.
subject: Subject
